commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Woe unto the inhabitants of the seacoast, the nation of the Cherethites. the word of the LORD is against you; O Canaan, the land of the Philistines, I will even destroy you, that there shall be no inhabitant. Literally, "line "(Haydock) with which land was measured. (Calmet) Reprobates. Hebrew cerethim, (Haydock) or Cerethi, of whom David's guards were formed. (Calmet) Septuagint, "people sprung the Cretans "whence some (Theodoret) of the Philistines came, perhaps rather than from Cyprus, as was conjectured, Genesis x. So the Philistines are styled contemptuously. They adored the same idols, Wisdom xii.
